message:
fix(store): distinguish empty library name from empty engine in FUNCTION LOAD error

FUNCTION LOAD previously collapsed both "missing engine" and "missing
library name" into a single generic `ERR Missing library metadata`
response. Real Redis differentiates these cases so clients can tell
whether the `#!engine` header was wrong vs the `name=` directive was
omitted.

Splits the single check into two: if `lib_name` is empty we now return
`ERR Library name was not given` (matches Redis exactly), and the
engine-empty branch keeps the existing generic metadata error.
